vocab.meaning: mô hình mang tính tương lai
vocab.example: I am eager to explore a futuristic paradigm in urban planning that prioritizes vertical forests and sustainable living.

vocab.meaning: tâm lý học xuyên văn hóa
vocab.example: If granted the opportunity, I would specialize in cross-cultural psychology to understand how societal norms shape individual behavior.
I wish to study renewable energy systems to learn how to effectively harness the power of tidal waves.

vocab.meaning: những câu hỏi về tri thức luận
vocab.example: Delving into philosophy would allow me to grapple with deep epistemological questions regarding the nature of truth.

vocab.meaning: sự bất bình đẳng kinh tế - xã hội
vocab.example: I would like to study public policy to develop strategies that can bridge the growing socio-economic disparities in developing nations.
I have a strong desire to master probabilistic modeling to predict long-term climate fluctuations more accurately.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng của / cơ sở cốt yếu của
vocab.example: I want to study classical literature because it serves as the bedrock of modern Western storytelling and thought.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/chặt chẽ về trí tuệ
vocab.example: Law is a field that demands immense intellectual rigor, which is why I find the prospect of studying it so enticing.

vocab.meaning: các mục tiêu phát triển bền vững
vocab.example: I plan to study international relations to contribute effectively to the United Nations' sustainable development goals.

vocab.meaning: khả năng thích ứng của hệ thần kinh (tính dẻo thần kinh)
vocab.example: Researching neuroplasticity would be fascinating as it explores how the brain can reorganize itself through learning and experience.
